description_long: This is a long, rectangular retail building with a symmetrical layout, featuring two prominent corner structures that likely serve as main entrances or anchor stores. The facade is detailed with a series of evenly spaced windows and doors, and the roofline is flat with subtle elevation changes at the corners. The central section of the building is slightly recessed, possibly indicating a main entrance or lobby area, and is flanked by decorative architectural elements. The exterior appears to be constructed from a combination of concrete, glass, and metal, with a muted color palette of grays, browns, and beige. The building's design suggests it is intended for commercial use, such as a strip mall or shopping center, and it is likely to be found along busy urban streets or in suburban retail complexes.
description: A long, rectangular retail building with two prominent corner structures, flat roof, and a series of windows and doors along the facade. The exterior features muted tones and a modern commercial design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the building, with both corner structures and the central recessed entrance area visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building and the symmetrical placement of the corner structures.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with similar architectural features and window placements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the building's depth and the arrangement of entrances and windows.
